Name: UInterpTrackMove
Description: Track containing data for moving an actor around over time.

Variables.Name: EulerTrack
Variables.Description: Actual rotation keyframe data, stored as Euler angles in degrees, for easy editing on curve.

Variables.Name: LookAtGroupName
Variables.Description: When using IMR_LookAtGroup, specifies the Group which this track should always point its actor at.

Variables.Name: LinCurveTension
Variables.Description: Controls the tightness of the curve for the translation path.

Variables.Name: AngCurveTension
Variables.Description: Controls the tightness of the curve for the rotation path.

Variables.Name: bUseQuatInterpolation
Variables.Description:
Use a Quaternion linear interpolation between keys.
	 	This is robust and will find the 'shortest' distance between keys, but does not support ease inout.

Variables.Name: bShowArrowAtKeys
Variables.Description: In the editor, show a small arrow at each keyframe indicating the rotation at that key.

Variables.Name: bDisableMovement
Variables.Description: Disable previewing of this track - will always position  AActor  at Time=0.0. Useful when keyframing an object relative to this group.

Variables.Name: bShowTranslationOnCurveEd
Variables.Description: If false, when this track is displayed on the Curve Editor in Matinee, do not show the Translation tracks.

Variables.Name: bShowRotationOnCurveEd
Variables.Description: If false, when this track is displayed on the Curve Editor in Matinee, do not show the Rotation tracks.

Variables.Name: bHide3DTrack
Variables.Description: If true, 3D representation of this track in the 3D viewport is disabled.
